name: Chicken and Stuffing Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Broiler-fryer chicken, cut into pieces
1 can (10-12 oz) Condensed cream of chicken soup or Cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Mix flour, paprika, and pepper together.
3. Coat chicken pieces with the flour mixture.
4. Cook chicken in oil over medium heat for 15 to 20 minutes or until browned.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Place chicken in an ungreased 2 1/2 quart casserole or square baking dish, 9x9x2".
7. Pour soup over the chicken.
8. Toss remaining ingredients and mound mixture on top of the chicken.
9. Cover and bake for 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
10. Serve: 6 portions
